title: Skyblock Enchanted
description:
Skyblock Enchanted is THE BEST Hypixel Skyblock modpack for 1.21.5.
Includes EVERY essential mod — performance, QoL, and utility — in one place.
Built for sweats, flippers, grinders, and dungeon mains alike.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f5e13f0d42eed218d09de86cc73a42bb3cffbaf.png)
**SKYBLOCK ENCHANTED (LATEST UPDATED FOR MINECRAFT VERSION: 1.21.5)**

Welcome to **Skyblock Enchanted** – the only modpack you’ll ever need for dominating Hypixel Skyblock on 1.21.5. Whether you're a dungeon crawler, AH flipper, or just grinding zealots for that Summoning Eyes, this pack’s got you covered. From SkyHanni, Dulkir and SkyblockAddons, to every QoL and HUD tweak imaginable, this is your one-stop-shop for max efficiency and minimal headaches.

**THIS PACK DOES _NOT_ SUPPORT FEATHER CLIENT!**

## Includes:

- Aaron Mod
- Architectury
- AuthMe
- BadOptimizations
- BazaarUtils
- BetterF3
- BetterGrassify
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)
- Capes
- ChatPatches
- Cloth Config
- Collective
- Cookies Mod
- Cubes Without Borders (CWB)
- DulkirMod
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- EntityCulling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Firmament
- Fzzy Config
- Gamma Utils
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris
- Krypton
- LambDynamicLights
- Lazy Language Loader
- Lithium
- MaLiLib
- MidnightLib
- ModelFix
- ModMenu
- MoreChatHistory
- MoreCulling
- No Telemetry
- No Chat Reports
- NoFrills
- OptiGUI
- Particle Core
- Placeholder API
- Polytone
- Puzzle
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- Scalable Lux
- Scoreboard Overhaul
- Scrollable Tooltips
- SkinLayers 3D
- Skyblock 21
- SkyblockAddons
- Skyblocker
- SkyCubed
- SkyHanni
- SkyLens
- SkyOcean
- Sodium Extra
- Sodium
- Sodium Core Shader Support
- SoundController
- ThreadTweak
- Very Many Players (VMP)
- WaveyCapes
- YetAnotherConfigLib v3
- Zoomify

## Incompatible Mods:

You have to look at the individual mod pages to identify incompatible mods. It is always easier to acheive this by launching Minecraft and reading the Fabric popup that informs you of this.


## DISCLAIMER:

This modpack includes third-party Minecraft mods created and owned by their respective authors. I do not claim ownership over any of the included mods, and I have not modified them in any way. This pack is solely meant as a convenient collection for Hypixel Skyblock players using Minecraft 1.21.5.
If you are a mod author and wish for your mod to be removed from this pack, please contact me, and I will comply immediately.
